titleStmt.title: SII 23.356: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 356. (A.R. No. 356 of 1907.) Āḍuturai, Papanasam Taluk, Tanjavur District Āpatsahāyēśvara temple—on the south wall of the central shrine Rājarāja I: year 9: 993-94 A.D.

summary.p: This records a gift of land 10 śey (mā?) in extent, after purchasing it from the temple itself, of Mahādēva at Tirukkuraṅgāḍutuṟai in Tiraimūr-nāḍu, by Śāttaṉ Aruvattāṟaṉ a member of the Pirāntaka-teriñja-Kaikkōḷar (regiment of the king?) for burning one perpetual lamp and nine ordinary lamps during the services in the temple, on behalf of four ladies (probably close relations of the donor) attached to the royal palace (Kōdaṇḍavēḷam) at Tañjāvūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirājarājakesarivatmaṟkku yāṇṭu 9Āvatu teṉ karaittirai
mūrnāṭṭut tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟaiy mahādevaṟku tañcāvūrkūṟṟa[t*tu] tañcāvūr Uṭai
yār kotaṇṭaveḷattu peṇṭāṭṭi Aṭiyaḷ colaikkum Aṭiyaḷ pira
māṇikkum caṇṭaṉavallikkum murukaṉ tiruvaṭikkum Āka Uṭaiyār pirāntakat
teriñca kaikkoḷaril cāttan Aruvattāṟaṉen tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai mahāde
variṭai vilaikoṇṭa nilam pattu Inilam tirunāvukkaraiyanukku me ṟkkum ten
pāṟkellai lokamārāyar kalluvitta nila(kuḷa?)ttukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Itte
var nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Uttamacoḻaṉṉāna vāyk kālukku teṟkkum I
vvicainta perunāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa nilam pattum vilai koṇṭu Aṭiyaḷcolaivai
cca noṉdāviḷakku Oṉṟum Aṭiyaḷ piramāṇikku nicatam po tonṟāka sandhiviḷakku 3 caṇṭaṉavalli
nicatam potonṟāka sandhiviḷakku 3 murukan tiruvaṭikku nicatam po toṉṟāka sandhiviḷakku 3 Āka sandhiviḷa
kku Oṉpatu viḷakku ṉāḷopāti Erippomānom tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai śrīkoyiluṭaiya
m te yoṭum ṟum Innilam
pattu ceyyum koṇṭu candrātitta
val koṇṭa poṉ Itu
panmāheśvararakṣai .
Icceyyin per
panmāheśvaran ..
Digital edition of SII 23.356 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
